title: Fancy Fences
body:
![Cover image featuring fence blocks and a gate made of birch wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b4bdfce4f271db9366541e3c82703839429eb87.png)

## About
This resource pack improves the look of fences and gates by adding separate textures for them. Simple, lightweight and easy to support.

## Features
- Added separate fence textures
- Added separate gate textures

## Compatibility
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) by FrozenBlock
